en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: TO JEDUTHUN. A PSALM OF DAVID. I said, "I will guard my ways, that I may not sin with my tongue; I will guard my mouth with a muzzle, so long as the wicked are in my presence."
zh: 我曾說：“我要謹慎我的行為， 不讓我的舌頭犯罪； 惡人在我面前的時候， 我總要用罩子約束我的嘴。”

en: I was mute and silent; I held my peace to no avail, and my distress grew worse.
zh: 我靜默不出聲， 甚至連好話也不說 ， 我的痛苦就更加劇烈。

en: My heart became hot within me. As I mused, the fire burned; then I spoke with my tongue:
zh: 我的心在我裡面發熱； 我默想的時候，心裡火燒； 我就用舌頭說話：

en: "O LORD, make me know my end and what is the measure of my days; let me know how fleeting I am!
zh: “耶和華啊！求你使我知道我的結局， 我的壽數有多少， 使我知道我的生命多麼短促。

en: Behold, you have made my days a few handbreadths, and my lifetime is as nothing before you. Surely all mankind stands as a mere breath! Selah
zh: 你使我的日子窄如手掌， 我的一生在你面前如同無有； 各人站得最穩的時候，也只不過是一口氣。

en: Surely a man goes about as a shadow! Surely for nothing they are in turmoil; man heaps up wealth and does not know who will gather!
zh: 世人來來往往只是幻影， 他們忙亂也是虛空； 積聚財物，卻不知道誰要來收取。

en: "And now, O Lord, for what do I wait? My hope is in you.
zh: 主啊！現在我還等候甚麼呢？ 我的指望在乎你。

en: Deliver me from all my transgressions. Do not make me the scorn of the fool!
zh: 求你救我脫離我的一切過犯， 不要使我遭受愚頑人的羞辱。

en: I am mute; I do not open my mouth, for it is you who have done it.
zh: 因為是你作了這事， 我就靜默不開口。

en: Remove your stroke from me; I am spent by the hostility of your hand.
zh: 求你除掉你降在我身上的災禍； 因你手的責打，我就消滅。

en: When you discipline a man with rebukes for sin, you consume like a moth what is dear to him; surely all mankind is a mere breath! Selah
zh: 你因人的罪孽，藉著責罰管教他們， 叫他們所寶貴的消失，像被蟲蛀蝕； 世人都不過是一口氣。

en: "Hear my prayer, O LORD, and give ear to my cry; hold not your peace at my tears! For I am a sojourner with you, a guest, like all my fathers.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你垂聽我的禱告， 留心聽我的呼求； 我流淚，求你不要緘默； 因為我在你面前是客旅， 是寄居的，像我所有的祖先一樣。

en: Look away from me, that I may smile again, before I depart and am no more!"
zh: 求你不要怒視我， 使我在去而不返之先，可以喜樂。”
